name: pcx
description: The PecanX compiler (pcx) — v0.4: lexer, parser, exhaustiveness + whole-program Hindley-Milner type inference, the `?` operator, multi-module linker, JavaScript / WebAssembly (WasmGC: records, sum types, strings) / virtual-DOM real-DOM backends, plus new/test/fmt/lsp (diagnostics, hover, completion, definition, formatting)/dev and the Orchard package manager.
